title: Help verify your identity using Interac® verification service - Canada.ca
content:
## Help verify your identity using Verified.Me

## Verify your identity using Interac ® verification service
Interac ® verification service is an identity verification process that you can use to register for My Service Canada Account (MSCA). Another verification method requires that you obtain a Personal Access Code (PAC). This can take up to 10 business days. The Interac ® verification service option allows you to register and access MSCA right away.
Validating your identity is a one-time action for new MSCA clients. Once registered, you will not need to go through this process again.
To use Interac ® verification service, make sure that your financial institution is included in the list of participating institutions:
- Prospera Credit Union
The Interac® verification service uses strong security protocols to protect your personal information and does not have access to your banking information.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
